---
title: "DWR Training Materials"
author:
  - name: "DataLab"
    url: "https://datalab.ucdavis.edu/"
    affiliations: "University of California, Davis"
date: today
---

:::{.callout-note}
Looking for more information about DataLab workshops?

Take a look at our [Workshop Descriptions and Materials
page][datalab-workshops].

[datalab-workshops]: https://datalab.ucdavis.edu/workshops/descriptions/
:::


## R Basics

* 10-4pm on Mar 5, 12 in [Shields 360][loc] and on Zoom
* [Workshop Reader][r-basics]

[loc]: https://datalab.ucdavis.edu/location/
[r-basics]: https://ucdavisdatalab.github.io/dwr_workshop_r_basics/


## Intro to Reproducible and Collaborative Computational Practices, Part 1

* Mar 19 in [Shields 360][loc] and on Zoom
